title: Rough Start
body:
# **_Rough Start_** overhauls the early and mid game progression by making it take slightly longer. 

![Flint Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/850e7f3c76a7dd194455c969f42ed9079d35fed4.png)
![Copper Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a44ad9cea9125c657d8213d0e4c5b5ccd998bac.png)

> ### Guide to getting started!
> 1. Break logs to get a crafting table
> 2. Find a flint patch or break gravel
> 3. Use the obtained flint to craft your first tools
> 3. Mine coal and make a campfire
> 4. Mine cobblestone and smelt it on the campfire
> 5. Craft a furnace with the stone
> 6. Obtain copper and smelt it into ingots
> 7. Craft copper gear
> 8. Mine Iron and create shears and tools
> 9. Use shears to get wool to craft a bed


<details>
<summary>Changes and Additions</summary>

> ### Changes/Additions:
> 1. Replaced Wooden tools with Flint tools
> 1. Replaced Stone tools with Copper tools
> 1. Replaced furnace crafting recipe
> 1. Replaced shears crafting recipe
> 1. Replaced sheild crafting recipe
> 1. Replaced anvil crafting recipe
> 1. Replaced lodestone crafting recipe
> 1. Replaced stonecutter crafting recipe
> 1. Replaced recipes for rail/activator rail/detector rail/powered rail
> 1. Made Totem of Undying apply Postmortality
> 1. Reduced non-deepslate copper ore drops
> 1. Made cobblestone and cobbled deepslate smeltable on campfires
> 1. Made Rotten flesh, Poisonous potato, spider eyes compostable
> 1. Made Rotten flesh smeltable into leather
> 1. Made Chains recipe give 4 chains
> 1. Removed wool drops when sheep are killed
> 2. Added bundle recipe
> 3. Added saddle recipe
> 1. Added Flint Dirt Patches
> 1. Added new chains item texture
> 1. Added chainmail armor recipes

</details>



![new furnace recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ff143e29023978016d5404768a32917a8e9ee51.png)

![New shears recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d4fc87ae9585f56b510529fd9e6f70af5100076.png)

![Cooking cobblestone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b0cc7f1b96bb19ee7f47561dd1abdc7dd86e20d.png)

### Will Rough Start be updated to 1.21.4 or above?
- **Short answer**: Probably not
- **Long anser**: Due to recend underlying changes to minecrafts engine, that has made some features impossible to update without making it incompatible with almost every other mod in existence. Due to this reason Rough Start will remain 1.20.1 exclusive for now.
